title: The Hooded Stranger
description: By a guttering fire sits a figure swathed in grey rags, face lost in shadow. A cracked deck of fortune cards waits face-down on a flat stone between you.

options.text: Share your rations and your story
options.result: The stranger listens, mends your wounds with a salve, and something in the telling leaves you steadier with people.

options.text: [Charm 5] Read the future in their cards
options.result: They deal three cards, nod slowly, and trace your fortune. You leave feeling the dice will fall your way.

options.text: [Luck] Cut the deck and take what fate gives
options.result_success: You turn the Sun. The stranger gifts you a keen Scavenger Lens and vanishes into the dark.
options.result_fail: You turn the Tower. A cold dread bleeds your vigor, though a few coins spill from the deck as consolation.
